examples: He is an eccentric character who likes wearing a beret and dark glasses.
The traditional headgear of the French farmer, the beret, is now rarely made in France itself.
The former Green Beret pleaded self-defense.
After a few harried phone calls, the Green Beret medic met them at the gate.
Several hundred people followed the coffin which was draped in a UDA flag, beret and gloves.
